title: Routine
description: PsychoPy Routine settings component. For fields that need dynamic changes, use $ prefix (e.g., $variable).

description.description: Some descriptive text to give information about this Routine

backgroundColor.description: Color of the screen this Routine. Use $ prefix for dynamic values (e.g., black, $[1.0,1.0,1.0], $variable)

backgroundImg.description: Image file to use as a background (leave blank for no image)

components.description: Components to include in the routine
